sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ التَّغْذِيَةُ السَّلِيمَةُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الْحَيَوِيَّةِ، فَالْجِسْمُ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى مَزِيجٍ دَقِيقٍ مِنَ الْعَنَاصِرِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ لِيَعْمَلَ بِكَمَالِ طَاقَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pravilna ishrana predstavlja kamen temeljac u očuvanju vitalnosti, jer tijelo treba preciznu mješavinu hranljivih materija kako bi radilo punim kapacitetom.
sentences.translationEn: Proper nutrition represents the cornerstone of maintaining vitality, as the body needs a precise mix of nutritional elements to function at its full capacity.

sentences.arabic: وَيُشَدِّدُ خُبَرَاءُ التَّغْذِيَةِ عَلَى ضَرُورَةِ التَّقْلِيلِ مِنَ الْأَطْعِمَةِ الْمُصَنَّعَةِ الَّتِي تَحْتَوِي عَلَى نِسَبٍ عَالِيَةٍ مِنَ السُّكَّرِيَّاتِ وَالْمَوَادِّ الْحَافِظَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nutricionisti naglašavaju potrebu za smanjenjem prerađene hrane koja sadrži visok nivo šećera i konzervansa.
sentences.translationEn: Nutritionists emphasize the need to reduce processed foods that contain high levels of sugars and preservatives.

sentences.arabic: فَلَوْ أَدْرَكَ النَّاسُ مَدَى ارْتِبَاطِ أَنْظِمَتِهِمْ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ بِطُولِ الْعُمْرِ، لَأَوْلَوْا اهْتِمَامًا بَالِغًا لِجَوْدَةِ الْمَكَوِّنَاتِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ فِي وَجَبَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Kada bi ljudi shvatili koliko je njihova ishrana povezana s dugovječnošću, posvetili bi veliku pažnju kvalitetu prirodnih sastojaka u svojim obrocima.
sentences.translationEn: If people realized how much their diet is linked to longevity, they would have paid great attention to the quality of natural ingredients in their meals.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَدُّ النِّظَامُ الَّذِي يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْبُقُولِيَّاتِ نَمُوذَجًا مِثَالِيًّا لِتَعْزِيزِ صِحَّةِ الْقَلْبِ وَالشَّرَايِينِ عَلَى الْمَدَى الطَّوِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Režim ishrane koji se oslanja na povrće i mahunarke smatra se idealnim modelom za jačanje zdravlja srca i arterija na duge staze.
sentences.translationEn: A diet that relies on vegetables and legumes is considered an ideal model for promoting heart and arterial health in the long run.

sentences.arabic: خِتَامًا، لَيْسَتِ التَّغْذِيَةُ مُجَرَّدَ وَسِيلَةٍ لِسَدِّ الرَّمَقِ، بَلْ هِيَ ثَقَافَةٌ وَعِلْمٌ يَضْمَنُ لِلْإِنْسَانِ حَيَاةً مَدِيدَةً خَالِيَةً مِنَ الْأَوْجَاعِ.
sentences.translation: U zaključku, ishrana nije samo način utoljavanja gladi, već kultura i nauka koja čovjeku garantuje dug život bez bolova.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, nutrition is not just a means to satisfy hunger, but a culture and a science that guarantees a long life free from pains for humans.
